CustomField.formula:
"Control #: " + BR() +
"Contact Information" + BR()+
"Name: " + SBQQ__Account__r.Name + BR() +
"Phone: " + SBQQ__Account__r.Phone + BR() +
"Email: " + SBQQ__Account__r.WOD_2_Email__c + BR() +
"Customer: " + NATT_Customer_Type__c + BR() +
"Customer Market Segment: " + Text(SBQQ__Account__r.NATT_Market_Segment2__c ) + BR() +
"Dealer AR Code: " + SBQQ__Account__r.CT_BaaN_customer_code__c + BR() +
"JDE AR Code: " + SBQQ__Account__r.NATT_AR_Code_JDE_AR_Code__c
CustomField.label: NATT Quote Template Summary Section
